name: shelftrack-api
description: Backend API for managing a book catalog with Express, Sequelize, and MySQL.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check book-management-api/server.js && node --check book-management-api/app.js && node --check book-management-api/config/db.js && node --check book-management-api/models/book.js && node --check book-management-api/routes/books.js && node --check book-management-api/controllers/booksController.js && node --check book-management-api/middleware/errorHandler.js && node --check book-management-api/middleware/notFound.js
